description: You are an HR analytics manager preparing a workforce quality report for the executive team. Using `employee_performance.csv` at `C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\employee_performance.csv` (columns: ID, Name, Age, Gender, Department, Salary, Joining Date, Performance Score, Experience, Status, Location, Session), build an HR analytics report in Power BI Desktop. The report must exclude all records with null or blank `Performance Score` values. Include a conditional column named `Performance_Tier` categorized as 'High' (Score > 3), 'Mid' (Score 2-3), and 'Low' (Score < 2). The report must contain a single page named 'Workforce Analysis' featuring: a Stacked Bar Chart of employee count by Department with Performance_Tier as the legend; a Line Chart of average Salary by Experience; and a Slicer for the Status column. Save the completed report to `C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\HR_Workforce_Analytics.pbix`. Login: user is `Docker`, no password required.
